name: Underworld Circle
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>黄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>泉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>み</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>輪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Activate this card if both players have 5 or more monsters in their GYs; destroy as many monsters on the field as possible, then each player banishes (face-down) all monsters from their Deck, then you can Special Summon 1 Normal Monster from your GY. Once per turn, during the Standby Phase: Activate this effect; each player can Special Summon 1 monster from their GY, ignoring its Summoning conditions, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only activate 1 "Underworld Circle" per Duel.
eff: Activate this card if both players have 5 or more monsters in their GYs; destroy as many monsters on the field as possible, then each player banishes (face-down) all monsters from their Deck, then you can Special Summon 1 Normal Monster from your GY. Once per turn, during the Standby Phase: Activate this effect; each player can Special Summon 1 monster from their GY, ignoring its Summoning conditions, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only activate 1 "Underworld Circle" per Duel.

summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's field
banished: Banishes cards when they leave the field
